description: Seed catalog of confirmed friction pattern_ids (#3165, Epic #3008/#3095). emitFriction (scripts/global/friction-event.js / hooks/scripts/friction_event.py) writes tier:1 v3 events keyed by these ids to ~/.megingjord/incidents.jsonl; the anneal-tier2-autofile recurrence model (cross-team weighted via friction-recurrence.js) promotes recurring ones to Tier-2. New pattern_ids may be emitted before they appear here — the catalog documents confirmed ones, it does not gate emission.

patterns.description: collaborator-preflight runs the full (flaky) test suite instead of the changed-file subset, so unrelated baseline failures block the handoff.
qwen2.5-coder:32b cross-family review times out or stalls on the fleet host; the 7b tier is the routine default.
Admin push gate reads the commit flag from the session (main) cwd while work lives in a linked worktree, so a committed worktree branch is falsely blocked 'commit step first'.
closeout-preflight required CONSULTANT_CLOSEOUT before the PR existed, inverting the baton in the deferred-final flow.

canonical-main enforcer false-blocks a shell '>' redirect or 'git checkout -- <path>' targeting a worktree-tracked file when the cwd is mis-detected as the main checkout. Workaround: use the Write tool or 'git -C <wt>'.
push gate scans the whole bash command, so a heredoc body containing the literal string 'git push' false-blocks the command. Workaround: write such files with the Write tool.
push gate blocks 'git push origin --delete <branch>' (a branch deletion has no commit) with 'commit step first'. Workaround: delete the remote ref via 'gh api -X DELETE .../git/refs/heads/<branch>'.

sync:claude / sync:codex copy the deployed runtime INTO the checkout (reverse direction); forward deploy is deploy:apply + deploy:claude:apply. Running sync from canonical main can regress merged files.
Historical MANAGER_HANDOFF without worktree_branch satisfied the #2876 first-edit gate while a session's authoritative handoff was posted after implementation (#2252 class).
pretool denied first edits when authoritative MANAGER_HANDOFF existed but session phase was still manager, telling the operator to wait for the next prompt — conflicting with single-operator mandate.

test-evidence tdd-pyramid checker matches only tests/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,ts}; a python-hooks PR with a pytest test_*.py fails 'missing-spec-file' though the matrix maps hooks/scripts/*.py to tdd-pyramid (pytest).
